# ClawSight Mission Control – Feedback Thread

ClawSight is an open-source dashboard for real-time agent observability (logs, cost, kill switch, share links). We just pushed Supabase login, per-user API keys, and a demo tenant so you can try it in seconds.

**Tell us:**
- What agents/apps are you monitoring?
- What metrics/alerts would unblock you?
- Integrations you want (LangChain, AutoGPT, Slack, etc.)?

Links: https://app.clawsight.org / https://www.clawsight.org
